name: pi-context
description: Pi package and workspace for git-backed memory and tape context in Pi.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @pi-context/pi-memory-core && npm run build --workspace pi-context
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @pi-context/pi-memory-core && npm run typecheck --workspace pi-context
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @pi-context/pi-memory-core && npm run test --workspace pi-context
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @pi-context/pi-memory-core && npm run lint --workspace pi-context
